must_read: 8:30 ET CPI — consensus 3.1% headline, 3.4% Core. Hot Core (>3.5%) likely tanks TLT; cool (<3.3%) lifts long-duration tech and your NVDA Jan26 LEAPS.
NVDA reports AMC — implied move 8.5%. Your PMCC short call (Jun20 145C) has $1,200 of premium left and 0.32 delta; consider rolling pre-earnings to avoid gap risk.
ECB rate decision 8:15 ET — 25bp cut consensus. If holds, EUR rips and your USD-funded longs get a tailwind.

econ_releases.name: Consumer Price Index (CPI) YoY
econ_releases.what: Headline year-over-year change in prices for a basket of consumer goods and services. Includes food and energy.
econ_releases.how_measured: BLS surveys ~80,000 prices monthly across 8 major categories. Shelter is the largest weight (~33%).
econ_releases.why_matters: Direct input to Fed reaction function. Hot CPI → fewer/later rate cuts → yields up, USD up, long-duration tech and gold sell off.
econ_releases.reaction_history: Hot surprise (+0.2pp vs est): SPY -0.6 to -1.5%, TLT -0.8 to -2.0%, DXY +0.4 to +0.8%. Cool surprise inverse.
econ_releases.watch_for_today: Subcomponents matter more than headline: shelter MoM, supercore (services ex-housing), goods deflation pace.

econ_releases.name: ECB Interest Rate Decision
econ_releases.what: European Central Bank decision on the Deposit Facility Rate, Main Refinancing Rate, and Marginal Lending Rate.
econ_releases.how_measured: Governing Council (6 Executive Board + 14 of 20 rotating NCB governors) decides. Lagarde press conference at 8:45am ET.
econ_releases.why_matters: EUR is the second-largest reserve currency. ECB-Fed divergence drives EUR/USD and DXY. ECB cutting while Fed holds = EUR weakness/USD strength.
econ_releases.reaction_history: ECB cuts while Fed holds: EUR/USD -0.5 to -1.0%, DXY +0.3 to +0.7%. Hawkish surprise (no cut when cut priced): EUR/USD +0.4 to +0.9%.
econ_releases.watch_for_today: Language on 'data dependent' vs. pre-commitment. Lagarde framing of growth-inflation tradeoff.

overnight.top_headline: China announces $50B stimulus targeting consumer goods; copper +1.2% overnight

rates.so_what: Real yields ticking up; tightens financial conditions even with nominal flat. Watch your duration-sensitive longs (XLK, semis).

eia_opec_today: OPEC+ JMMC tomorrow; EIA inventories Wednesday 10:30 ET

fx.so_what: USD/JPY at 155.4 — BOJ intervention risk zone. Watch for sudden Asia-session yen rip.
